ambiguities.description: BOPET heat-setting paper (SRC002) reports 'tensile strength' without clearly specifying MD or TD direction for each reported value
ambiguities.impact: Direction-specific comparison with other papers limited
ambiguities.mitigation: Used abstract's qualitative description: MD decreased, TD modulus increased

ambiguities.description: Exact numerical values for haze, crystallinity, tensile strength at each heat-setting temperature not available (paywalled). Only qualitative trends from abstract.
ambiguities.impact: Quantitative trend analysis not possible for heat-setting effects
ambiguities.mitigation: Estimated approximate values based on trend descriptions for reporting structure

ambiguities.description: PET/PGA paper reports '90 ± 2.2% oxygen permeability reduction' but does not specify the film thickness at which this comparison was made
ambiguities.impact: Absolute OTR values (cc/m²·day·atm) cannot be compared with other barrier membrane data
ambiguities.mitigation: Reported as percentage reduction relative to neat PET under same conditions

ambiguities.description: Fold resistance characterization: paper uses 48h and 4d hold times for fold mark formation, but no cycle-based fatigue test (GPT, MIT folding tester)
ambiguities.impact: Cannot directly correlate with display industry's ≥200,000 fold cycle requirement
ambiguities.mitigation: Reported molecular mechanism qualitatively; quantitative GPT correlation requires future work

ambiguities.description: Patent reports 'third monomer' CHDM/isosorbide at '0.1-0.8:10 molar ratio' without specifying the exact ratio for the best-performing example
ambiguities.mitigation: Reported formulation range as stated in patent
